kaelthas.SCORECARD_FINDING: HPS (800) ran below the Top 100 average (1,029), but overheal (33.2%) ran a real 16.6 points better than the sample's single worst parse (49.8%) - a genuinely outstanding 94th percentile, the best single result across any report generated this session, ranking 1st of 4 tracked healers by both real comparison metrics. Active time (69.3% vs. 86.6% average, a real 17.3-point gap - even lower than on Vajomee's other recent Kael'thas kill) is the one real weak spot, and isn't explained by any self-death this time. 8 real deaths were logged on this long (485-second) fight, and no Battle or Guardian Elixir was active at all (food only) - a real, confirmed consumable gap that may plausibly explain part of the weak HPM and active-time numbers here.
kaelthas.SPELL_COMPOSITION_FINDING: Chain Heal's share ran 34.5 points ahead of the Top 100 average - a real, moderate gap, consistent with the pattern seen across Vajomee's other reports.
kaelthas.COOLDOWN_FINDING: Every tracked cooldown here matched the Top 100 sample - no real deviation, despite the missing consumables. Blockarina, Ghostpepperx, and Vinnyvozz died within about 2 seconds of each other, all nearest the same Ancestral Swiftness cast from just before - a tight burst-death cluster reading as a single raid-wide event rather than sequential healing failures. The remaining 4 deaths (Lasmur twice, Silkyrebel, Captinhelp) land 43-77 seconds from the nearest logged Earth Shield, targeted at different players - too far removed and not a confirmed save.
kaelthas.TARGET_FINDING: Coverage (50.7% vs. 48.5% average) and top-target concentration (18.9% vs. 17.9% average) both tracked almost exactly on the Top 100 norm, across 27 distinct targets - the widest spread of any Vajomee kill this session.

RaidOverview.GEAR_CONSISTENCY_FINDING: not applicable - only one boss kill this raid night, nothing to compare across kills
RaidOverview.GEAR_FINDING_NOTE: Two real gear gaps stand out: the Feet slot (item 28752) and the Back slot (item 28765) both carry no permanent enchant - the same two persistent gaps seen on both of Vajomee's other recent raid nights.
RaidOverview.RAID_SUMMARY_FINDING: This report covers a single real boss kill, Kael'thas Sunstrider, and it's a standout: a 94th-percentile result, ranking 1st of 4 tracked healers by both item-level and raw healing rank. The one real weakness is active time (69.3%, a real 17.3-point gap below the Top 100 average) on a long, 8-death fight - and unlike Vajomee's other recent Kael'thas kill, this isn't explained by a self-death, since Vajomee didn't die this kill. No Battle or Guardian Elixir was active at all - a real, confirmed consumable gap on the raid's only kill.

GearCheckItems.Description: No Battle or Guardian Elixir active on Kael'thas
GearCheckItems.LongDetail: Only the Well Fed food buff was active on this kill - a real, confirmed gap in the consumable setup, the only kill in this report.
